title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Broadcom India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Broadcom India
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
